news.headline: Quansah and James miss England training as right-back problems mount
news.desc: Jarell Quansah and Reece James miss training as England's right-back issues mount before their World Cup last-32 match against DR Congo on Wednesday.

news.headline: France superstars thriving thanks to Deschamps' bold changes
news.desc: Why Didier Deschamps' changes to personnel and formation could propel 2022 runners-up France to go one better in this World Cup.

news.headline: Pick Mainoo over Anderson against DR Congo - Rooney
news.desc: Former England captain Wayne Rooney says he would start Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo instead of Elliot Anderson in Wednesday's World Cup last-32 tie with DR Congo.

news.headline: Germany fans in need of hope as prospect of Klopp looms
news.desc: As Germany again fail to progress at a World Cup BBC Sport looks at the fallout from their defeat by Paraguay and what happens next.

news.headline: The Paraguay hero who sold his kit when his son was born
news.desc: Orlando Gill has become Paraguay's World Cup hero but was in football obscurity 18 months ago and had to sell his kit to support his family after the premature birth of his son.

news.headline: US security chief 'danced happy dance' after Iran exit
news.desc: The United States' head of homeland security says he "danced a happy dance" when Iran's elimination from the World Cup was confirmed.

news.headline: 'Germany no longer first-class team ' - is this the end for Nagelsmann?
news.desc: Germany make a shock last-32 exit against Paraguay, losing a World Cup penalty shootout for the first time to pile pressure on boss Julian Nagelsmann.

news.headline: Paraguay's tears of joy over World Cup shock
news.desc: How Paraguay marked one of the biggest wins in their footballing history with euphoric celebrations.

news.headline: 45 minutes from Brazil 'humiliation' - but 'Crafty Carlo' does it again
news.desc: Half-time in Houston and Brazil's players trudged off facing another early World Cup exit. But we should have known better than to doubt Carlo Ancelotti.

news.headline: 'A joke' - how a 'terrible' VAR disallowed goal cost Germany
news.desc: Alan Shearer, Jurgen Klopp, Pat Nevin and Darren Cann feel Germany were hard done by as a VAR call rules out a potential winning goal before they lose on penalties to Paraguay.

news.headline: Emotional Gakpo scores days after loss of unborn son
news.desc: Liverpool forward Cody Gakpo scores for the Netherlands days after the loss of his unborn son, as they are knocked out on penalties by Morocco.

news.headline: Where to watch the World Cup on the BBC and ITV
news.desc: All the TV and radio details for each of the 2026 World Cup knockout games.
